title: Marcus Aurelius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Antoninus was Roman emperor from 161 to 180 and a Stoic philosopher.

title: Augustus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Augustus, also known as Octavian, was the founder of the Roman Empire and the first Roman emperor from 27 BC until his death in AD 14.

title: Nero becomes Roman emperor
fact: Nero Claudius Caesar Augustus Germanicus was a Roman emperor and the final emperor of the Julio-Claudian dynasty, reigning from AD 54 until his suicide in AD 68.

title: Caligula becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gaius Julius Caesar Augustus Germanicus, also called Gaius and Caligula, was the third Roman emperor, ruling from AD 37 until his assassination in AD 41.

title: Constantine the Great becomes Roman emperor
fact: Constantine I, also known as Constantine the Great, or known mononymously as Constantine, was Roman emperor from AD 306 to 337 and the first Roman emperor to convert to Christianity.

title: Tiberius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Tiberius Julius Caesar Augustus was Roman emperor from AD 14 until 37.

title: Commodus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Commodus was Roman emperor from 177 to 192, first serving as nominal co-emperor under his father Marcus Aurelius and then ruling alone from 180.

title: Hadrian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Hadrian was Roman emperor from 117 to 138.

title: Claudius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Tiberius Claudius Caesar Augustus Germanicus, or Claudius, was a Roman emperor, ruling from AD 41 to 54.

title: Elagabalus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Antoninus, better known by his posthumous nicknames Elagabalus and Heliogabalus, was Roman emperor from 218 to 222, while he was still a teenager.

title: Trajan becomes Roman emperor
fact: Trajan was a Roman emperor from AD 98 to 117, remembered as the second of the Five Good Emperors of the Nerva–Antonine dynasty.

title: Diocletian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Diocletian, nicknamed Jovius, was Roman emperor from 284 until his abdication in 305.

title: Caracalla becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Antoninus, better known by his nickname Caracalla, was Roman emperor from 198 to 217 AD, first serving as nominal co-emperor under his father and then ruling alone after 211 AD.

title: Septimius Severus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Lucius Septimius Severus was Roman emperor from 193 to 211.

title: Titus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Titus Flavius Vespasianus was Roman emperor from 79 to 81 AD.

title: Julian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Julian was the Caesar of the West from 355 to 360 and Roman emperor from 361 to 363, as well as a notable philosopher and author in Greek.

title: Vespasian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Vespasian was Roman emperor from 69 to 79.

title: Domitian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Domitian ( də-MISH-ən, -⁠ee-ən; Latin: Domitianus was Roman emperor from 81 to 96.

title: Aurelian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Aurelian was a Roman emperor from 270 to 275 during the Crisis of the Third Century.

title: Pertinax becomes Roman emperor
fact: Publius Helvius Pertinax was Roman emperor for the first three months of 193, succeeding Commodus and becoming the first ruler of the turbulent Year of the Five Emperors.

title: Theodosius I becomes Roman emperor
fact: Theodosius I, also known as Theodosius the Great, was Roman emperor from 379 to 395.

title: Antoninus Pius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Titus Aelius Hadrianus Antoninus Pius was Roman emperor from AD 138 to 161.

title: Valerian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Valerian was Roman emperor from 253 to spring 260 AD.

title: Nerva becomes Roman emperor
fact: Nerva was a Roman emperor from AD 96 to 98.

title: Macrinus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Opellius Macrinus was a Roman emperor who reigned from April 217 to June 218, jointly with his young son Diadumenianus.

title: Didius Julianus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Didius Julianus was Roman emperor from March to June 193, during the Year of the Five Emperors.

title: Galba becomes Roman emperor
fact: Galba was Roman emperor, ruling for 7 months from 8 June AD 68 to 15 January 69.

title: Otho becomes Roman emperor
fact: Otho was Roman emperor, ruling for three months from 15 January to 16 April 69.

title: Vitellius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Aulus Vitellius was Roman emperor, ruling for eight months from 19 April to 20 December AD 69.

title: Severus Alexander becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Severus Alexander, also known as Alexander Severus, was Roman emperor from 222 until 235.

title: Maximinus Thrax becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gaius Julius Verus Maximinus "Thrax" was a Roman emperor from 235 to 238.

title: Geta becomes Roman emperor
fact: Publius Septimius Geta was Roman emperor with his father Septimius Severus and older brother Caracalla from 209 to 211.

title: Philip the Arab becomes Roman emperor
fact: Philip I, commonly known as Philip the Arab, was Roman emperor from 244 to 249.

title: Lucius Verus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Lucius Aurelius Verus was Roman emperor from 161 until his death in 169, alongside his adoptive brother Marcus Aurelius.

title: Constantius II becomes Roman emperor
fact: Constantius II was Roman emperor from 337 to 361.

title: Decius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gaius Messius Quintus Trajanus Decius, known as Trajan Decius or simply Decius, was Roman emperor from 249 to 251.

title: Gordian III becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gordian III was Roman emperor from 238 to 244.

title: Gallienus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Publius Licinius Egnatius Gallienus was Roman emperor with his father Valerian from 253 to 260 and alone from 260 to 268.

title: Constantius Chlorus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Flavius Valerius Constantius, also called Constantius I, was a Roman emperor from 305 to 306—and was father of Constantine the Great, the first Christian emperor of Rome.

title: Valentinian I becomes Roman emperor
fact: Valentinian I, sometimes known as Valentinian the Great, was Roman emperor from 364 to 375.

title: Maximian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Maximian, nicknamed Herculius, was Roman emperor from 286 to 305.

title: Claudius Gothicus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Claudius "Gothicus", also known as Claudius II, was Roman emperor from 268 to 270.

title: Maxentius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Valerius Maxentius was a Roman emperor from 306 until his death in 312.

title: Theodosius II becomes Roman emperor
fact: Theodosius II, called "the Calligrapher", was Roman emperor from 402 to 450.

title: Valens becomes Roman emperor
fact: Valens was Roman emperor from 364 to 378.

title: Jovian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Jovian was Roman emperor from June 363 to February 364.

title: Carus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Carus was Roman emperor from 282 to 283.

title: Probus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Probus was Roman emperor from 276 to 282.

title: Tacitus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Claudius Tacitus was Roman emperor from 275 to 276.

title: Trebonianus Gallus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gaius Vibius Trebonianus Gallus was Roman emperor from June 251 to August 253, in a joint rule with his son Volusianus.

title: Constantine II becomes Roman emperor
fact: Constantine II was Roman emperor from 337 to 340.

title: Galerius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Galerius Valerius Maximianus was Roman emperor from 305 to 311.

title: Pupienus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Clodius Pupienus Maximus was Roman emperor with Balbinus for 99 days in 238, during the Year of the Six Emperors.

title: Aemilian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aemilius Aemilianus, also known as Aemilian, was Roman emperor for two months in 253.

title: Quintillus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Claudius Quintillus was a short-lived Roman emperor.

title: Carinus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Aurelius Carinus was Roman Emperor from 283 to 285.

title: Licinius becomes Roman emperor
fact: Valerius Licinianus Licinius was Roman emperor from 308 to 324.

title: Gratian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gratian was emperor of the Western Roman Empire from 367 to 383.

title: Florian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Marcus Annius Florianus, also known as Florian, was briefly Roman emperor in the year 276.

title: Valentinian II becomes Roman emperor
fact: Valentinian II was a Roman emperor in the western part of the Roman Empire between AD 375 and 392.

title: Constans becomes Roman emperor
fact: Flavius Julius Constans, also called Constans I, was Roman emperor from 337 to 350.

title: Maximinus Daza becomes Roman emperor
fact: Galerius Valerius Maximinus, born as Daza, was Roman emperor from 310 to 313.

title: Gordian I becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gordian I was Roman emperor in AD 238 with his son Gordian II during the Year of the Six Emperors.

title: Balbinus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Decimus Caelius Calvinus Balbinus was Roman emperor with Pupienus for three months in 238, the Year of the Six Emperors.

title: Numerian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Numerian was Roman emperor from 283 to 284 with his older brother Carinus.

title: Severus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Flavius Valerius Severus, also called Severus II, was a Roman emperor from 306 to 307, and a member of the Tetrarchy.

title: Diadumenian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Diadumenian was the son of the Roman emperor Macrinus and served as his co-ruler for a brief time in 218.

title: Gordian II becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gordian II was briefly Roman emperor in AD 238 with his father Gordian I during the Year of the Six Emperors.

title: Herennius Etruscus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Quintus Herennius Etruscus Messius Decius, known simply as Herennius Etruscus, was briefly Roman emperor in 251, ruling jointly under his father Decius.

title: Volusian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Gaius Vibius Volusianus, commonly called Volusian, was a Roman emperor from 251 to 253, ruling with his father Trebonianus Gallus.

title: Silbannacus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Silbannacus was an obscure Roman emperor or usurper during the Crisis of the Third Century.

title: Vetranio becomes Roman emperor
fact: Vetranio was briefly an imperial usurper and emperor in the Roman Empire in 350, during which time he controlled Illyricum between the rival emperors Magnus Magnentius and Constantius II, eventually capitulating to the latter.

title: Hostilian becomes Roman emperor
fact: Hostilian was briefly Roman emperor in 251.

title: Saloninus becomes Roman emperor
fact: Publius Licinius Cornelius Saloninus Valerianus, typically just called Saloninus, was a young Roman nobleman who briefly became emperor in 260.

title: Flavius Victor becomes Roman emperor
fact: Victor was a Western Roman emperor from either 383/384 or 387 to August 388.
